exploration_notes: The chain from Deployment spec change to Pod creation: (1) DeploymentController.syncDeployment (deployment_controller.go) is the main reconcile entry point — it calls dc.sync(), dc.rolloutRolling(), or dc.rolloutRecreate() depending on strategy. (2) sync.go contains sync() which calls getNewReplicaSet() to create/find the ReplicaSet, and scale() to adjust replica counts. (3) ReplicaSetController.syncReplicaSet (replica_set.go) reconciles ReplicaSets — it calls manageReplicas() which calls rsc.po
